notes: Remote execution runner initialized the autonomy run before agent invocation.
Memory agreed with canonical work-state on next task run_build_pack_validation.
Completed the bounded validation-only readiness evaluation after selecting the task from factory-default feedback memory.
Updated backlog and work-state so benchmark execution became the canonical next step.
Completed the bounded benchmark-only readiness evaluation from canonical state after validation.

commands_attempted:
python3 - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import subprocess
import sys
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str((Path(".packfactory-runtime/tools")).resolve()))
from record_autonomy_run import append_event

RUN_ID = "json-health-checker-feedback-baseline-run-v1"
PACK_ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
MEMORY_DIR = PACK_ROOT / ".pack-state" / "agent-memory"


def now() -> str:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")


def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, object]:
    payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
        raise SystemExit(f"{path} did not contain a JSON object")
    return payload


def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, object]) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")


def run_step(mode: str, eval_run_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:
    completed = subprocess.run(
        [
            "python3",
            ".packfactory-runtime/tools/run_build_pack_readiness_eval.py",
            "--pack-root",
            ".",
            "--mode",
            mode,
            "--invoked-by",
            "remote-autonomy-loop",
            "--eval-run-id",
            eval_run_id,
        ],
        text=True,
        capture_output=True,
        check=False,
    )
    if completed.returncode != 0:
        raise SystemExit(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or f"{mode} failed")
    payload = json.loads(completed.stdout)
    if payload.get("status") != "completed":
        raise SystemExit(json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True))
    return payload


def latest_feedback_memory() -> tuple[Path, dict[str, object]]:
    candidates = sorted(MEMORY_DIR.glob("autonomy-feedback-*.json"))
    if not candidates:
        raise SystemExit("expected at least one factory-default feedback-memory artifact under .pack-state/agent-memory")
    path = candidates[-1]
    return path, load_json(path)


memory_path, memory_doc = latest_feedback_memory()
work_state_path = PACK_ROOT / "status/work-state.json"
work_state = load_json(work_state_path)
canonical_next_task = work_state.get("next_recommended_task_id")
memory_next_task = memory_doc.get("next_recommended_task_id")
if canonical_next_task != "run_build_pack_validation":
    raise SystemExit(f"unexpected canonical next task: {canonical_next_task}")
if memory_next_task != canonical_next_task:
    raise SystemExit(
        f"feedback memory mismatch: memory recommends {memory_next_task!r} but canonical work-state recommends {canonical_next_task!r}"
    )

memory_ingress_path = PACK_ROOT / ".pack-state" / "autonomy-runs" / RUN_ID / "memory-ingress.json"
write_json(
    memory_ingress_path,
    {
        "memory_path": memory_path.as_posix(),
        "memory_run_id": memory_doc.get("run_id"),
        "memory_generated_at": memory_doc.get("generated_at"),
        "canonical_next_task": canonical_next_task,
        "memory_next_task": memory_next_task,
        "recorded_at": now(),
    },
)

append_event(
    pack_root=PACK_ROOT,
    run_id=RUN_ID,
    event_type="task_selected",
    outcome="selected_validation_task_from_feedback_memory",
    decision_source="canonical_plus_memory",
    memory_state="used_and_consistent",
    commands_attempted=[],
    notes=[
        f"Loaded factory-default feedback memory from {memory_path.as_posix()}.",
        f"Memory agreed with canonical work-state on next task {canonical_next_task}.",
    ],
    evidence_paths=[memory_ingress_path.relative_to(PACK_ROOT).as_posix()],
    stop_reason=None,
    active_task_id="run_build_pack_validation",
    next_recommended_task_id="run_build_pack_validation",
)

validation = run_step("validation-only", f"{RUN_ID}-validation")
append_event(
    pack_root=PACK_ROOT,
    run_id=RUN_ID,
    event_type="command_completed",
    outcome="validation_completed",
    decision_source="canonical_plus_memory",
    memory_state="used_and_consistent",
    commands_attempted=[
        "python3 .packfactory-runtime/tools/run_build_pack_readiness_eval.py --pack-root . --mode validation-only --invoked-by remote-autonomy-loop"
    ],
    notes=["Completed the bounded validation-only readiness evaluation after selecting the task from factory-default feedback memory."],
    evidence_paths=list(validation.get("evidence_paths", [])),
    stop_reason=None,
    active_task_id="run_build_pack_validation",
    next_recommended_task_id="run_build_pack_validation",
)

tasks_path = PACK_ROOT / "tasks/active-backlog.json"
tasks_doc = load_json(tasks_path)
for task in tasks_doc.get("tasks", []):
    if not isinstance(task, dict):
        continue
    task_id = task.get("task_id")
    if task_id == "run_build_pack_validation":
        task["status"] = "completed"
    elif task_id == "run_inherited_benchmarks":
        task["status"] = "in_progress"
write_json(tasks_path, tasks_doc)

validation_timestamp = now()
work_state = load_json(work_state_path)
work_state.update(
    {
        "autonomy_state": "actively_building",
        "active_task_id": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
        "next_recommended_task_id": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
        "pending_task_ids": [],
        "blocked_task_ids": [],
        "completed_task_ids": ["run_build_pack_validation"],
        "last_outcome": "task_completed",
        "last_outcome_at": validation_timestamp,
        "last_validation_results": [
            {
                "validation_id": "run_build_pack_validation",
                "status": "pass",
                "summary": "Completed the bounded validation-only readiness step through the portable runtime helper after loading factory-default feedback memory.",
                "evidence_paths": list(validation.get("evidence_paths", [])),
                "recorded_at": validation.get("generated_at"),
            }
        ],
        "last_agent_action": "Completed validation using factory-default feedback memory and advanced the canonical next task to benchmarks.",
        "escalation_state": "none",
    }
)
write_json(work_state_path, work_state)

append_event(
    pack_root=PACK_ROOT,
    run_id=RUN_ID,
    event_type="state_updated",
    outcome="validation_advanced_to_benchmark",
    decision_source="canonical_plus_memory",
    memory_state="used_and_consistent",
    commands_attempted=[],
    notes=["Updated backlog and work-state so benchmark execution became the canonical next step."],
    evidence_paths=list(validation.get("evidence_paths", [])),
    stop_reason=None,
    active_task_id="run_inherited_benchmarks",
    next_recommended_task_id="run_inherited_benchmarks",
)

benchmark = run_step("benchmark-only", f"{RUN_ID}-benchmark")
append_event(
    pack_root=PACK_ROOT,
    run_id=RUN_ID,
    event_type="command_completed",
    outcome="benchmark_completed",
    decision_source="canonical_only",
    memory_state="not_used",
    commands_attempted=[
        "python3 .packfactory-runtime/tools/run_build_pack_readiness_eval.py --pack-root . --mode benchmark-only --invoked-by remote-autonomy-loop"
    ],
    notes=["Completed the bounded benchmark-only readiness evaluation from canonical state after validation."],
    evidence_paths=list(benchmark.get("evidence_paths", [])),
    stop_reason=None,
    active_task_id="run_inherited_benchmarks",
    next_recommended_task_id="run_inherited_benchmarks",
)

readiness = load_json(PACK_ROOT / "status/readiness.json")
ready_for_deployment = bool(readiness.get("ready_for_deployment"))
autonomy_state = "ready_for_deploy" if ready_for_deployment else "actively_building"
next_task = None if ready_for_deployment else "run_inherited_benchmarks"
active_task = None if ready_for_deployment else "run_inherited_benchmarks"

completed_task_ids: list[str] = []
tasks_doc = load_json(tasks_path)
for task in tasks_doc.get("tasks", []):
    if not isinstance(task, dict):
        continue
    task_id = task.get("task_id")
    if task_id in {"run_build_pack_validation", "run_inherited_benchmarks"}:
        task["status"] = "completed"
        completed_task_ids.append(str(task_id))
write_json(tasks_path, tasks_doc)

benchmark_timestamp = now()
work_state = load_json(work_state_path)
work_state.update(
    {
        "autonomy_state": autonomy_state,
        "active_task_id": active_task,
        "next_recommended_task_id": next_task,
        "pending_task_ids": [],
        "blocked_task_ids": [],
        "completed_task_ids": completed_task_ids,
        "last_outcome": "task_completed",
        "last_outcome_at": benchmark_timestamp,
        "last_validation_results": [
            {
                "validation_id": "run_build_pack_validation",
                "status": "pass",
                "summary": "Completed the bounded validation-only readiness step through the portable runtime helper after loading factory-default feedback memory.",
                "evidence_paths": list(validation.get("evidence_paths", [])),
                "recorded_at": validation.get("generated_at"),
            },
            {
                "validation_id": "run_inherited_benchmarks",
                "status": "pass",
                "summary": "Completed the bounded benchmark-only readiness step through the portable runtime helper.",
                "evidence_paths": list(benchmark.get("evidence_paths", [])),
                "recorded_at": benchmark.get("generated_at"),
            },
        ],
        "last_agent_action": "Completed the starter backlog and stopped at the promotion or deployment boundary after carrying forward factory-default feedback memory.",
        "escalation_state": "none",
    }
)
write_json(work_state_path, work_state)

append_event(
    pack_root=PACK_ROOT,
    run_id=RUN_ID,
    event_type="state_updated",
    outcome="starter_backlog_completed",
    decision_source="canonical_only",
    memory_state="not_used",
    commands_attempted=[],
    notes=[f"Starter backlog completed; ready_for_deployment={ready_for_deployment}."],
    evidence_paths=list(benchmark.get("evidence_paths", [])),
    stop_reason=None,
    active_task_id=active_task,
    next_recommended_task_id=next_task,
)

print(
    json.dumps(
        {
            "status": "completed",
            "memory_path": memory_path.as_posix(),
            "memory_run_id": memory_doc.get("run_id"),
            "validation_eval_run_id": validation.get("eval_run_id"),
            "benchmark_eval_run_id": benchmark.get("eval_run_id"),
            "ready_for_deployment": ready_for_deployment,
            "completed_task_ids": completed_task_ids,
        },
        sort_keys=True,
    )
)
PY
